message:
feat(fusion,fsfs): add embedding cache integration with builder-order safety, CLI command tests

- Add `with_embedding_cache()` to TwoTierSearcher with builder-order-safe
  quality tier wrapping (stores capacity, auto-wraps later `with_quality_embedder`)
- Add `embedding_cache_capacity` field to TwoTierSearcher struct
- Add 4 fusion-level cache-wiring tests with CountingEmbedder test double
- Fix redundant Arc clones flagged by clippy in cache tests
- Add 15 CLI command integration tests (bd-2w7x.42): index, search, stream,
  explain, version, error paths, format consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
